questionHtml:
Biodiesel containing ethanol can be made from renewable resources.

Suggest one environmental disadvantage of producing biodiesel from renewable resources.
markschemeHtml:
use of «farm» land «for production»
OR
deforestation «for crop production for fuel»
OR
can release more NOx «than normal fuel on combustion»   [✔]

 

Note: Ignore any reference to cost.

meta.title: Biodiesel containing ethanol can be made from renewable resources. Suggest one environmental disadvantage of producing biodiesel from renewable resources.
breadcrumbLabels: Reactivity 1.3.4—Biofuels are produced from the biological fixation of carbon over a short period of time through photosynthesis. Understand the difference between renewable and non-renewable energy sources. Consider the advantages and disadvantages of biofuels.
